Settings.Title: Compendium Search Exclusions
Settings.Description: Check the compendium packs you want to exclude from the sidebar content search. Excluded packs will still appear in the sidebar normally, but their contents will not be included in search results.

Configure.Name: Configure Search Exclusions
Configure.Label: Configure
Configure.Hint: Choose which compendium packs are excluded from the sidebar content search.

Settings.NoPacks: No compendium packs are currently available.
